headline: Lam Research CEO Sees AI Fueling $140 Billion Chip Equipment Boom
summary: Lam Research (NASDAQ:LRCX) President and CEO Tim Archer said AI demand is reshaping the semiconductor equipment market across logic, memory, storage and packaging, creating what Bernstein analyst Stacy Rasgon described as a “renaissance” for wafer fab equipment. headline: How The Lam Research (LRCX) Narrative Is Shifting With New Targets And WFE Spending Debates
summary: Lam Research’s analyst fair value estimate has been updated to US$313.69 from US$309.52, a small but important shift in the latest round of research. This change aligns with a cluster of higher price targets and rating moves that focus on expectations for wafer fab equipment spending across NAND, DRAM and high bandwidth memory, as well as Lam’s position in those areas. Read on to see how these updated targets, and the debate behind them, can help you follow the story as it develops. Stay...

headline: Top 5 Stocks That Will Ride the Data Center Chip Equipment Supercycle
summary: Jim Cramer called it “the greatest time in the history of the industry” on Mad Money Thursday night, and the data is screaming the same thing: Applied Materials (NASDAQ:AMAT) is up 75% year to date as the AI data center buildout has triggered shortages across every node, every fab, and every piece of capital equipment ...
